body_text:
24:09 â February 28, 2024
Update to the Enterprise Fraud Management Part
We updated the Enterprise Fraud Management Part as described in the table below.
Electronic Transactions Volume
Enterprise Fraud Management Part
We updated images throughout the Part to reflect the addition of Reports.
Section 2.2, Frequently Asked Questions
We updated Question 20 and added Question 23.
Section 4.2, EFM User Roles
We added the Tenant Report role.
Section 6.1, Overview of Navigating Enterprise Fraud Management
We added a Reports link.
Section 7.2, Overview of Incidents on the Incidents Page
We added instructions on how to expand and hide the sidebar, and how to use the Select None option.
Section 8.1, Overview of Managing Transaction Alerts
We updated all email notification examples and when email notifications are sent (when manual alerts are created by FAS).
Section 8.4, Identifying Alerts in Auto Risk Transactions
We updated processes on how to identify Auto Risk transactions.
Section 8. 8, Recovery of Funds
We clarified the Recovery of Funds process.
Section 10, Enterprise Fraud Management Reports
We added a new section regarding EFM Reports.
Questions
Enterprise Fraud Management, email
efm@central1.com
.
